question_text: Which of the following is a property of solids?

options.label: A
options.text: They have a fixed shape and fixed volume

options.label: B
options.text: They take the shape of their container

options.label: C
options.text: Their particles move freely and randomly

correct_answer: They have a fixed shape and fixed volume
explanation: Solids have a fixed shape and fixed volume because their particles are tightly packed together and held in fixed positions by strong forces between them. This is a defining characteristic that distinguishes solids from liquids and gases.
